streetRecommendations.name: Axis Bank
streetRecommendations.rationale: BUY rating based on normalizing credit costs, healthy asset quality, and gaining loan growth momentum. Expected RoE of 13.9% in FY28E, trading at 1.6x FY28E book.

streetRecommendations.name: Bank of Baroda
streetRecommendations.rationale: ADD rating, preferred among PSU banks for healthy loan growth, improving asset quality, and strong capital position. Trades at roughly 1x FY28E book, with RoE seen at 11.1% in FY28E.

streetRecommendations.name: Cipla
streetRecommendations.rationale: BUY rating, earnings expected to have bottomed out, with strong FY27E recovery from a robust US launch pipeline, improving India momentum, and cost efficiencies. EPS forecast to climb from Rs 52.7 to Rs 62.4 over FY27E-28E.

streetRecommendations.name: Mahindra & Mahindra
streetRecommendations.rationale: BUY rating, expected to outperform industry growth in tractors and commercial vehicles with a product-launch cycle through CY30E.

streetRecommendations.name: United Spirits
streetRecommendations.rationale: ADD rating, revenue growth expected to improve in FY27E, with cost efficiencies and premiumization offsetting inflation.
